top_signals.title: OECD: Government spending to fuel UK economy this year as business investment falls
top_signals.summary: The UK economy’s growth forecast has been moderately upgraded as an expansion in GDP this year is set to be fuelled by high government expenditure, according to the world’s top independent economic organisation.  The OECD, the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development for long, said public expenditure would “support the economy” even as consumer spending [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Three more arrested over January’s suitcase robbery in Tokyo
top_signals.summary: The three men are believed to have close ties with major crime syndicates.
